---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in Rootmark
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of the unexpected behavior.

## To Reproduce

```bash
rootmark verify .
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full output if possible.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Rootmark version: [e.g. 0.1.0]

## Additional Context

Add any relevant `AGENTS.md` content, config snippets, or screenshots.
